mvp_analysis.Complexity_Reasoning: High technical complexity due to AI/LLM integration (API dependencies, prompt engineering, context management).
MVP_Focus_Features: Single-page interface taking user input and returning an output via a simple LLM call (e.g., OpenAI API).
MVP_Cut_Features: User authentication (Login/Signup - test without passwords initially).
Saving chat history to database (Session state is enough for now).
Custom model training (Use prompt engineering first instead of fine-tuning).
Tech_Recommendations: 🐍 **Backend/Core**: Python (FastAPI or Streamlit)
🧠 **AI Integration**: LangChain or direct OpenAI/Anthropic API
🌐 **Frontend**: Streamlit (Zero frontend effort) or Vercel + Next.js (Better UX)
🗄️ **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) or Firebase

tasks: Conduct short interviews with your target audience (min 5 people) about the product idea.
Choose one of the recommended tools (Python (FastAPI or Streamlit)) and create an account.
Buy a domain and set up a simple landing page.
Focus feature: Single-page interface taking user input and returning an output via a simple LLM call (e.g., OpenAI API).
Absolutely exclude all features we cut ('nice-to-have') from development.
Don't aim for design perfection, focus solely on functionality.
Test the product yourself and with 2-3 people from your circle.
Fix critical bugs, just make the interface understandable.
Add a manual payment or 'lead collection' step.
Share your MVP on Reddit, Product Hunt, X, or industry LinkedIn groups.
Set up a communication channel (Discord/WhatsApp) for instant feedback from early users.
Decide whether to pivot or persevere based on reactions.

finance_analysis.LTV_CAC_Comment: Close to industry standards (2.5x - 3x). May require improvement.
Red_Flags: ⚠️ Estimated LTV/CAC ratio (2.5x) is below the VC ideal of 3x. Unit economics might be challenging.
🚨 Overall Investment Score is low. Bootstrapping is recommended before seeking VC funding.

Buy a domain and set up a simple landing page.
Focus feature: Single-page interface taking user input and returning an output via a simple LLM call (e.g., OpenAI API).
Absolutely exclude all features we cut ('nice-to-have') from development.
Don't aim for design perfection, focus solely on functionality.
Test the product yourself and with 2-3 people from your circle.
Fix critical bugs, just make the interface understandable.
Add a manual payment or 'lead collection' step.
Share your MVP on Reddit, Product Hunt, X, or industry LinkedIn groups.
Set up a communication channel (Discord/WhatsApp) for instant feedback from early users.
Decide whether to pivot or persevere based on reactions.

finance_analysis.LTV_CAC_Comment: Close to industry standards (2.5x - 3x). May require improvement.
Red_Flags: ⚠️ Estimated LTV/CAC ratio (2.5x) is below the VC ideal of 3x. Unit economics might be challenging.
🚨 Overall Investment Score is low. Bootstrapping is recommended before seeking VC funding.

mvp_analysis.Complexity_Reasoning: High technical complexity due to AI/LLM integration (API dependencies, prompt engineering, context management).
MVP_Focus_Features: Single-page interface taking user input and returning an output via a simple LLM call (e.g., OpenAI API).
MVP_Cut_Features: User authentication (Login/Signup - test without passwords initially).
Saving chat history to database (Session state is enough for now).
Custom model training (Use prompt engineering first instead of fine-tuning).
Tech_Recommendations: 🐍 **Backend/Core**: Python (FastAPI or Streamlit)
🧠 **AI Integration**: LangChain or direct OpenAI/Anthropic API
🌐 **Frontend**: Streamlit (Zero frontend effort) or Vercel + Next.js (Better UX)
🗄️ **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) or Firebase
